description_long: This object is a large commercial passenger airplane, featuring a wide fuselage and four underwing engines, each mounted on pylons beneath the wings. The aircraft is painted primarily in white with a metallic underbelly and sports a distinctive livery with green, red, and black accents on the tail fin, which is swept and tall. The wings are low-mounted, swept back, and equipped with upward-angled winglets at the tips, enhancing aerodynamic efficiency. The landing gear is visible and consists of multiple wheels, indicating a heavy-duty tricycle configuration suitable for large aircraft. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with a multi-windowed, enclosed design typical of modern airliners. The overall design and proportions suggest a long-range, high-capacity airliner, likely modeled after the Airbus A380 or a similar double-deck aircraft.
description: A large, white commercial passenger airplane with four underwing engines, swept low-mounted wings with winglets, and a colorful tail fin. The aircraft features a forward, multi-windowed cockpit and robust landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing three identical airplanes, highlighting the nose, cockpit windows, and the full span of the landing gear and engines beneath the wings.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full fuselage length, the four underwing engines, the colorful tail fin, and the detailed livery along the body.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizing the tail fin, horizontal stabilizers, and the trailing edges of the wings with visible winglets.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the other side of the fuselage, engines, and tail design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with upward-angled winglets at the tips and slight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Four turbofan engines mounted under the wings, two per wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single tall vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with multiple main gear units and a nose gear, all retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, typical of a multi-seat commercial airliner.
